LanguageData.BSL_LaunchShuttleDesc: Configure or launch a passenger shuttle on this map.
LanguageData.BSL_NoShuttles: No passenger shuttles are available on this map.
LanguageData.BSL_NoAvailableShuttles: No available passenger shuttles on this map.
LanguageData.BSL_ReturnHomeDesc: Launch this passenger shuttle toward one of your home maps.
LanguageData.BSL_NoValidHome: No valid home destination is available.
LanguageData.BSL_LaunchWhenReadyDesc: Choose a destination now and automatically launch when loading, cooldown, and vanilla launch requirements are satisfied.
LanguageData.BSL_CancelQueuedLaunchDesc: Cancel only the scheduled automatic launch. Existing loading orders are left unchanged.
LanguageData.BSL_WaitingForFuel: Waiting for fuel: distance {0}, current range {1}
LanguageData.BSL_LastDepartureCellUnavailable: The last departure spot cannot be used.
LanguageData.BSL_QueuedLaunchAlreadyExists: A scheduled launch already exists. Cancel it before scheduling a new launch.
LanguageData.BSL_AutoReturnLandingFallback: Could not use the last departure landing spot: {0}
LanguageData.BSL_ReadyShortcutTooltip: Open loading and destination selection, then schedule launch when ready.
LanguageData.BSL_MenuLaunchToSettlementDesc: List other player settlements and schedule launch after choosing a landing spot.
LanguageData.BSL_SelectSettlementDestinationTooltip: Schedule launch to {0}. You will choose a landing spot next.
LanguageData.BSL_ReturnWithLandingSelectionTooltip: Return to {0} and choose a landing spot.
LanguageData.BSL_ReturnToLastDepartureCellTooltip: Return to {0} and use the last departure spot if it is still valid.
LanguageData.BSL_SettingShowLaunchStatusInInspectPane: Show launch status in the inspect pane
Shows the same vanilla launch-blocking reason in the lower-left inspect pane.
LanguageData.BSL_DestinationTargetingStartFailed: Could not start destination selection for the scheduled launch.
